nodes.name: README
nodes.summary: Documentation for the frontend covering all pages, technology stack, file structure, API configuration, browser support, and enhancement roadmap

nodes.name: admin
nodes.summary: Admin dashboard with auth gate, pipeline import status, rank movement table, cron schedule info, and notification config; triggers backend import via REST API with X-Admin-Key header

nodes.name: comparison
nodes.summary: ELO vs AP Poll prediction accuracy page with Chart.js visualizations, season selector, regular/postseason breakdowns, and games-where-systems-disagreed table

nodes.name: elo-formula
nodes.summary: Interactive ELO algorithm explainer with live win probability calculator, accordion sections for each formula step and system constants reference

nodes.name: games
nodes.summary: Game results and schedule page listing completed and upcoming games with week filter, scores, winner/loser links, and ELO rating changes per game

nodes.name: index
nodes.summary: Main rankings homepage with ELO-based team rankings table, season/limit selectors, prediction accuracy banner, historical season indicator, and game predictions grid

nodes.name: matchup
nodes.summary: Head-to-head matchup page with team search/autocomplete pickers, win probability bar, side-by-side season stats, ELO history chart, and all-time series table

nodes.name: simulator
nodes.summary: Preseason rating simulator with sliders for formula weights (recruiting, transfers, returning production, position strength) showing live simulated rankings vs official

nodes.name: team
nodes.summary: Individual team detail page showing ELO rating, preseason factor breakdown, position group strength radar, ELO history chart, game log, and full season schedule

nodes.name: teams
nodes.summary: All-teams browse page with card grid, conference filter buttons (All/P4/G5/FCS), text search, and sort options (ELO/alphabetical/record)
